nodes.name: 🔔 Webhook — Inject Schema (called by WF09A)
nodes.notes: Called by WF09A after every new blog post. Also runs daily scan to patch any posts missing schema. Receives: post_id, post_type (article/product/faq).

nodes.name: ⏰ Daily Schema Audit (3 AM)
nodes.notes: Daily scan finds any posts missing schema markup and injects it.

nodes.name: ⚙️ Detect Schema Types Needed
nodes.notes: Detects which schema types each post needs: Article (all posts), FAQPage (posts with Q&A sections), HowTo (step-by-step guides). Skips posts that already have schema injected.

nodes.name: ⚙️ Build JSON-LD Schema Markup
nodes.notes: Builds Article, FAQPage (extracts real Q&A from content), HowTo (extracts steps), and Breadcrumb schema. All in valid JSON-LD format. FAQPage is the highest-value schema for AI citations and featured snippets.

nodes.name: ✏️ Inject Schema Into WordPress Post
nodes.notes: Updates WordPress post with schema prepended to content. Google and AI search engines pick this up within 1-7 days of re-crawling.

meta.description: WF12A: Schema Markup Injector. Builds and injects Article, FAQPage, HowTo, and BreadcrumbList JSON-LD schemas into all WordPress posts. FAQPage schema is highest-value for Google featured snippets and AI Overview citations. Daily audit patches any posts missing schema. Called by WF09A after every new post.
